# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a flag value with the specified bitfield.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: CFOptionFlags)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: A bitfield containing the flags to enable.
title: init(rawValue:)
